title: Instrument Cluster Calibration — Yamaha Motorcycle
description: Mileage calibration for a Yamaha motorcycle instrument cluster. The unit was disassembled, connected directly to the PCB, original memory data was read, corrected and verified, followed by complete display and indicator testing.
image_alt: Yamaha motorcycle instrument cluster mileage calibration AKEI Latvia
meta_description: Yamaha motorcycle instrument cluster mileage calibration with direct PCB access and full display testing.
